clauses: §Content addressing (recompute on fetch; the hash is the trust anchor)
note: The fixture is the representation-stable JSON-LD PD plus exactly one added dcterms:description triple (asserted at generation time). Rejecting it proves the acceptance in pd-hash-stable-across-representations comes from graph identity, not from lenient JSON-LD handling.
title: verify-pd-pin: a JSON-LD rendering whose graph differs by ONE added triple MUST be rejected — content pins regardless of serialization
